case_title: PERSOLVE, LLC VS. CHRISTINE REITER et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-28-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT ; DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PERSOLVE, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DBA, ACCOUNT RESOLUTION ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT REITER, CHRISTINE AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-07-2013

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-28-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
